name: leadsher-performance-tests
description: Artillery performance tests for all LeadsHer microservices

scripts.test:auth: artillery run auth-service.yml --output reports/auth-report.json && artillery report reports/auth-report.json
scripts.test:mentorship: artillery run mentorship-service.yml --output reports/mentorship-report.json && artillery report reports/mentorship-report.json
scripts.test:story: artillery run story-service.yml --output reports/story-report.json && artillery report reports/story-report.json
scripts.test:forum: artillery run forum-service.yml --output reports/forum-report.json && artillery report reports/forum-report.json
scripts.test:resource: artillery run resource-service.yml --output reports/resource-report.json && artillery report reports/resource-report.json
scripts.test:event: artillery run event-service.yml --output reports/event-report.json && artillery report reports/event-report.json
scripts.test:all: npm run test:auth && npm run test:mentorship && npm run test:story && npm run test:forum && npm run test:resource && npm run test:event
